phases.result:
Planning pipeline complete. Story persisted and flipped to `agent::ready`.

## Plan summary

**Story #1** — [JSON REST API for user accounts and personal notes with persistent on-disk store](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-0c228e2d/issues/1)

One cohesive Story (default-single: the endpoints share one server, one auth mechanism, and one store — no architectural seam to split on).

**Scope:** ESM Node.js, built-ins only (no web framework), listening on `PORT` (default 3000), with a durable on-disk store (`node:sqlite` file or equivalent atomic on-disk store — not in-memory).

**Endpoints:** `POST /signup`, `POST /login` (opaque bearer session), `GET /me`, `POST /notes`, `GET /notes` — with per-user note isolation, hashed passwords, sensible 4xx handling, and an `npm start` script.

**Acceptance:** 7 observable criteria covering signup/duplicate rejection, login/401, `/me` auth, note creation + owner-only listing, bad-request handling, restart persistence, and the port/start-script contract.
**Verify:** `npm test`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`.

**Pipeline gates:**
- Gate #1 (intent) & Gate #2 (pre-persist review) — auto-proceeded under `--yes`.
- Critics: consolidation and pre-mortem both `dispatch: false` (skips ledgered); text-hygiene clean.
- Persist dry-run passed all deterministic gates; real persist created issue #1 under cohort label `plan-run::06a61cff`.

Per instructions, I ran **only** the planning pipeline — no delivery. Deliver later with `/deliver 1`.

Story #1 delivered and landed. Terminal envelope:

**`status: landed`** — PR [#2](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-0c228e2d/pull/2) merged to `main` (squash), `agent::done`.

| Field | Result |
| --- | --- |
| Gates | validation ✅ · base-sync ✅ · code-review ✅ (critical 0 / high 0 / medium 0) |
| Acceptance self-eval | `proceed` — 7/7 criteria met (round 1) |
| Merge | auto-merge armed → confirmed in `sync` mode |
| Tail | follow-ups, status-resync, ref-cleanup ✅ |

One non-blocking degrade: post-land base fast-forward of local `main` was skipped (`dirty-tree` — the pre-existing untracked `temp/` in the main checkout). The merge stands on `origin/main`; nothing to fix.

**What shipped** (dependency-free, ESM, Node built-ins only):
- `src/server.js` — `http`-based JSON API: `POST /signup`, `POST /login`, `GET /me`, `POST /notes`, `GET /notes`; bearer-token auth; malformed-JSON/oversize/unknown-route all return 4xx; outer try/catch keeps the process alive.
- `src/store.js` — on-disk JSON store with atomic write (temp + rename), loaded on startup so users/notes survive restart; scrypt+salt password hashing, opaque 32-byte session tokens, per-owner note isolation.
- `test/api.test.js` — 8 `node:test` e2e tests, one per acceptance criterion incl. a real restart-persistence check; all pass.
- `package.json` — added `"start": "node src/server.js"`; `PORT` env honored (default 3000).
